context:
## Domain Intelligence (from chip portfolio)

### domain-chip-labs (chip-research) -- Quality: 88/100 (production_ready)

**Key doctrines:**
- [medium] Advisory outputs are more trustworthy when they preserve the query context that narrowed the search space. (evidence: exploratory_frontier)
- [medium] Benchmark honesty requires recording when low scores come from evaluator drift versus genuine product weakness. (evidence: exploratory_frontier)
- [medium] The lab is useful when benchmark results translate directly into product actions. (evidence: exploratory_frontier)
- [medium] Bounded mutation spaces with human approval gates are the correct default for self-editing the lab. (evidence: exploratory_frontier)
- [medium] The lab's runtime and evaluators must share one manifest compatibility layer or they will mis-score structurally valid chips. (evidence: exploratory_frontier)
